title: heliophila lyrata
intro: Heliophila lyrata is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, commonly known as the cabbage or mustard family, native to South Africa. Traditionally, Heliophila lyrata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Heliophila lyrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
